'''Tranese''' was the language of the [[Iotran/Legends|Iotran]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Iotra]]. It was a rich language, showing simplicity and accuracy in both its words and its construction. Iotrans considered that [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] was a convoluted and rude language; however, they understood the advantages of learning it, and usually took the effort to do so.<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology" />

{{Language-stub}}
